description: Reproduction of the Norman Rockwell mid-century illustration 'Merry Christmas, Grandma!' posted by the Department of Labor. The painted scene shows a 1950s family crowding through a front doorway carrying wrapped gifts: a man in a brown hat and coat and a woman in a teal coat carry presents, a boy in a red cap holds a wrapped box, a girl in a red outfit holds a gift, a beagle leaps up at center, and a small child in a red hooded snowsuit sits on the floor at right with mouth open holding a present with a bow. The setting is a decorated home entry with a holly-trimmed door, evergreen wreath with red bow, red paper garland, and a braided rug; the palette is reds, greens, and browns. There is no on-image text, agency seal, slogan, or graphic overlay; the only marking is the artwork itself. The caption and attribution appear only in the tweet text, not on the image.
notable_text: (none on image; tweet attributes it as 'Merry Christmas, Grandma!' by Norman Rockwell)
